projects.name: Ras El Hekma Egypt
projects.description: The historic $35B mega-development set to transform the region into a global tourism and financial hub. It will include residential districts, international hotels, a free zone, and a dedicated airport.
projects.amenities: International Airport, Financial District, World-Class Marina, Smart City Infrastructure

projects.name: Youd
projects.description: A newly launched luxury community at Km 187, neighboring Salt and Katameya Coast. It features a terraced design ensuring 90% of units have sea views.
projects.amenities: 1km Beachfront, Swimmable Lagoons, Boutique Hotel, Sports District

projects.name: Fouka Bay
projects.description: An award-winning project at Km 211 tailored around 12 islands and 7km of coastline. It emphasizes water activities and a tropical lifestyle.
projects.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, The House Hotel, Beach Hub, Commercial Strip

projects.name: La Vista Cascada
projects.description: Located at Km 143 in Sidi Abdel Rahman, Cascada offers the signature La Vista rich landscaping and tiered architecture, ensuring sea views and privacy.
projects.amenities: Cascading Pools, Private Beach, Supermarket, Maintenance & Security

projects.name: Mountain View Ras El Hekma
projects.description: A massive 121-acre community modeled after the Greek islands (Santorini/Mykonos). It features white and blue architecture and a strong community spirit.
projects.amenities: 19 Swimming Pools, Ladies Beach, Agora Commercial Hub, Promenade

projects.name: Soul
projects.description: Emaar's ultra-luxury beach destination. A low-density project featuring 'Locanda' hotels and lagoons, designed for the elite market.
projects.amenities: Locanda Hotel, Underwater Sculpture Park, Pier Infinity Pool, Lagoon Cabanas

projects.name: Stella Sidi Abdelrahman
projects.description: Located in one of the most beautiful bays (Sidi Abdel Rahman), this resort is known for its massive commercial mall (Stella Walk) and lively summer atmosphere.
projects.amenities: Stella Walk (Commercial Mall), Hotel, Swimming Pools, Landscape Gardens

projects.name: Almaza Bay
projects.description: A premier destination in Marsa Matrouh known for its 5 renowned Jaz hotels and some of the clearest waters in the Mediterranean.
projects.amenities: Sammy's Beach Bar, Jaz Almaza Beach Hotel, Pier 88, Sports Camp

projects.name: Swanlake North Coast
projects.description: A sophisticated community in Ras El Hekma designed by JZMK Partners. It features a series of lagoons and elevated homes for optimal views.
projects.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, Clubhouse, Boutique Hotel, Sports Facilities

projects.name: Seashell Sidi Abdel Rahman
projects.description: An exclusive, high-end community known for its minimalist 'G-Style' architecture and elite social scene. It is one of the most sought-after destinations.
projects.amenities: The G Hotel, Alchemy-designed beach bar, Sports hub, Crystal lagoons

projects.name: Marina El-Alamein
projects.description: The historic heart of the North Coast, spanning 7 gates. It features Egypt's first international yacht marina and a massive array of entertainment and nightlife options.
projects.amenities: International Yacht Marina, Porto Marina Hotel, Jetty and Promenade, Shops and Cinemas

projects.name: Marseilia Beach 4
projects.description: A family-oriented resort in Sidi Abdel Rahman, distinguished by its large swimming pools and competitive pricing, making it a popular choice for summer rentals.
projects.amenities: Large swimming pools, Aqua park, Shopping mall, Mosque

projects.name: Ghazala Bay
projects.description: One of the oldest and most prestigious bays on the coast. It hosts the Rixos Alamein Hotel and upscale private villas, known for its calm turquoise waters.
projects.amenities: Rixos Alamein Hotel, Private Beach Coves, Fine Dining Restaurants, Water Sports

projects.name: Stella Di Mare Sidi Abdelrahman 1
projects.description: A classic destination located on a prime spot in Sidi Abdel Rahman. Known for its lively atmosphere, large commercial mall, and established community.
projects.amenities: Stella Walk (Commercial Mall), Hotel Stella, Swimming Pools, Landscaped Gardens

projects.name: La Vista Bay East
projects.description: An extension of the La Vista Bay project, featuring the developer's signature cascading architecture which guarantees sea views for almost all units.
projects.amenities: Cascading Pools, Grand Hotel, Sports Courts, Commercial Area

projects.name: The Waterway North Coast
projects.description: A boutique luxury compound featuring a distinctive modern wooden aesthetic. It offers a hotel-like experience with high-end finishing and landscaping.
projects.amenities: The Waterway Hotel, Commercial Strip, Infinity Pools, Beach Clubhouse

projects.name: North Edge New Alamein
projects.description: The pioneering residential towers of New Alamein City, offering year-round living with panoramic views of the turquoise sea and the Alamein lagoon.
projects.amenities: Sky Lounge, Commercial Podium, Infinity Pools, Smart Home Systems

projects.name: Katameya Coast
projects.description: A terraced project designed to ensure every unit sees the sea. Known for its 'See-Through' garage concept and high-end minimalist villas.
projects.amenities: Panoramic Beach Platform, Clubhouse, Boutique Hotel, Wellness Spa

projects.name: Zoya Ghazala Bay
projects.description: Located in the prime Ghazala Bay, Zoya offers a low-density community with standalone villas and twin houses designed for privacy and luxury.
projects.amenities: Beach Clubhouse, Five-star Hotel, Retail Area, Artificial Lakes

projects.name: Gaia
projects.description: Inspired by the Greek Goddess of Earth, Gaia is a 280-acre coastal destination blending seaside charm with modern needs. Designed by Chapman Taylor, it features diverse architectural styles.
projects.amenities: KYND 01 Hotel, Bar Du Port, Private Beach, Sports Zone

projects.name: Zahra Morshedy Group
projects.description: A massive mixed-use development in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Golden Square), featuring modern architecture and a wide array of entertainment facilities.
projects.amenities: International Hotels, Commercial Strip, Clubhouses, Lagoon pools

projects.name: Caesar Bay
projects.description: Specifically refers to the Caesar Bay Resort area, known for its pristine beach and hotel. It is adjacent to SODIC's Caesar, sharing the same prime bay.
projects.amenities: Caesar Bay Hotel, Beach Bar, Water Activities Center, Spa & Gym

projects.name: Palm Hills New Alamein
projects.description: Located behind the New Alamein Towers, this project offers a mix of apartments and twin houses overlooking the Alamein lagoon.
projects.amenities: Lagoon View Promenade, Commercial Mall, Sports Club, International School

projects.name: The Island - Marina 5
projects.description: A distinct zone within Marina 5, characterized by island-like layouts surrounded by the main lagoon channels, offering high privacy.
projects.amenities: Private Boat Docks, Direct Lagoon Access, Jet Ski Zone, Gated Security

projects.name: Crysta
projects.description: Refers to the Crystal Lagoons phase of Bo Islands. The area is known for its massive network of man-made lagoons and the electric tram system.
projects.amenities: Electric Tram, Crystal Lagoons, Strip Mall, Waterfront Cabanas

projects.name: Lagoons Al Alamin
projects.description: Also known as 'Downtown New Alamein', this area features residential buildings surrounding swimmable lagoons and retail plazas.
projects.amenities: Swimmable Lagoons, Retail Plazas, Bike Lanes, Cultural Hub

projects.name: Il Latini SED
projects.description: The 'Latin District' of New Alamein, designed with classic Greco-Roman architecture. It brings the charm of old Alexandria to the new city.
projects.amenities: Classic Architecture, Library, University Campus nearby, Commercial Piazzas

projects.name: Cali Coast Ras El Hekma
projects.description: A Californian-inspired resort offering a laid-back surfer vibe. It features a unique boardwalk and landscaping designed by American architects.
projects.amenities: The Boardwalk, Lazy River, FlowRider (Surf simulator), Commercial Hub

projects.name: Bianchi Ilios
projects.description: A revival of the historic Bianchi beach, now modernized with Greek-style architecture (Ilios). It focuses on wellness and elite community living.
projects.amenities: Wellness Center, Swimmable Lagoon, Boutique Hotel, Private Beach

projects.name: Emirates Heights
projects.description: Located on a high cliff in Ras El Hekma, offering elevated views of the sea. Known for its colorful architecture and diving center.
projects.amenities: Diving Center, Cliff-top pools, Hotel, Aqua Park

projects.name: Golf Porto Marina
projects.description: A massive family entertainment hub centered around a golf course. Known for its promenade, aqua parks, and high-energy summer atmosphere.
projects.amenities: 18-hole Golf Course, Aqua Park, Papa Porto Carnival, Shopping Promenade

projects.name: Azzar Island
projects.description: A boutique villa-only community in Ras El Hekma. It features a unique layout where every unit has direct access to a swimmable lagoon/beach.
projects.amenities: Private Beach for every villa, Swimmable Lagoons, Open Air Gym, Spa

projects.name: Marsellia Land
projects.description: Located near El Alamein, this resort is famous for its massive aqua park, making it a top choice for families with children.
projects.amenities: Large Aqua Park, Hotel, Shopping Mall, Theater

projects.name: Lasirena North Coast
projects.description: Located at Km 165, this resort features a terraced design ensuring sea views. It is known for its active community and multiple swimming pools.
projects.amenities: Aqua Park, Covered Ladies Pool, Commercial Mall, Beach Club

projects.name: D.O.S.E
projects.description: A wellness-oriented resort in Ras El Hekma. 'DOSE' stands for Dopamine, Oxytocin, Serotonin, Endorphin, reflecting its focus on happiness and mental health.
projects.amenities: Medical Center, Ladies-only beach, Infinity Pools, Kids Academy

projects.name: Sea View
projects.description: Built on a high plateau in Ras El Hekma, Sea View offers 5 distinct terraces rising up to 40 meters above sea level, guaranteeing panoramic views.
projects.amenities: Plateau Aqua Park, Food Court, 5-star Hotel, Sports Club

projects.name: Marsa Baghush
projects.description: A niche, nature-first community in Sidi Heneish designed by renowned architect Shehab Mazhar. It features botanical gardens and simple, elegant architecture.
projects.amenities: Botanical Gardens, Beach Bar, Horizon Pools, Serviced Apartments

projects.name: Palm Hills New Alamein Mall
projects.description: The commercial hub serving the Palm Hills New Alamein residential area, offering premium retail and dining options.
projects.amenities: Retail Stores, Restaurants & Cafes, Supermarket, Outdoor Plazas

projects.name: Bo Sidi Abdelrahman
projects.description: Often referred to as Bo Sands/Bo Islands, this is a massive lagoon-based project in Sidi Abdel Rahman known for its vibrant colors and electric tram.
projects.amenities: Electric Tram, Crystal Lagoons, Bo Hub (Commercial), Waterfront Hotels

projects.name: Agora Sidi Abdelrahman
projects.description: A prominent commercial complex in Sidi Abdel Rahman, serving as a key nightlife and dining destination for surrounding resorts.
projects.amenities: Restaurants & Cafes, Supermarket, Pharmacy, Retail Shops

projects.name: Stella Heights
projects.description: Located at Km 134, Stella Heights offers a mix of villas and chalets with a focus on privacy and proximity to the Sidi Abdel Rahman bay.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Clubhouse, Commercial Area, Landscape Gardens

projects.name: LVLS Mountain View
projects.description: A luxury phase of Mountain View Ras El Hekma built on elevated terraces (Levels), offering exclusive sea views and a Grecco-inspired design.
projects.amenities: Blu Ville (Commercial), Seaview Pools, Hospitality services, Sandy Beach

projects.name: Diplo 2
projects.description: Mountain View Diplomats (Diplo) is an exclusive community for diplomats and high-profile residents, known for its tight-knit community and Italian/Greek style.
projects.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Kids Areas, Sports Courts

projects.name: Il Latini City Edge
projects.description: The 'Latin District' brings old Alexandrian charm to New Alamein. It is a fully self-sufficient district with schools, hospitals, and classic architecture.
projects.amenities: Classic Piazzas, Library, Mosque & Church, Retail Promenade

projects.name: Gaia Cabanas
projects.description: The dedicated cabana phase within the Gaia resort, located closest to the beach and the KYND 01 hotel.
projects.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Hotel Services, Beach Bar, Lagoon View

projects.name: Playa Ghazala
projects.description: An exclusive enclave within the Ghazala Bay area, often associated with the Seashell community. Known for ultra-luxury beach houses.
projects.amenities: Ghazala Bay Beach, Exclusive Clubhouse, Fine Dining, Water Sports

projects.name: Hacienda Heneish
projects.description: Palm Hills' newest launch in Sidi Heneish (2024), bringing the famous Hacienda luxury brand to the pristine waters of Heneish.
projects.amenities: Boutique Hotel, Beach Clubhouse, Sports Facilities, Commercial Hub

projects.name: Alma New Alamein
projects.description: A mixed-use project in New Alamein City offering modern residential units with access to the city's main amenities.
projects.amenities: Shopping Mall, Swimming Pools, Gym & Spa, Kids Area

projects.name: Beach Front Towers
projects.description: The iconic 'North Edge' towers standing right on the turquoise waters of Alamein. They redefined vertical living in the North Coast.
projects.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Sky High Gyms, Commercial Podium, Concierge Services

projects.name: Bungalows
projects.description: Located at Km 73, Bungalows offers a cozy, family-friendly environment with affordable chalet options and plenty of pools.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Football Court, Supermarket, Mosque

projects.name: Marina 8 By The Lake
projects.description: The newest expansion of the legendary Marina El Alamein, featuring modern lake-front villas and a revamped infrastructure.
projects.amenities: Lake Promenade, Water Activities, Modern Clubhouse, Gated Security

projects.name: Rivette - Amwaj
projects.description: The commercial and retail hub of the Amwaj resort. It features a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment venues.
projects.amenities: Cinema, Kids Area, Supermarket, Restaurants

projects.name: Hacienda White
projects.description: The epitome of 'Old Money' luxury on the North Coast. Known for its 'Il Corte' mall, glamorous beach parties, and elite community.
projects.amenities: Il Corte Mall, Kiki's Beach Bar, Boutique Hotel, Lake-yard

projects.name: La Vista Bay
projects.description: The original La Vista in Ras El Hekma. Famous for its strict community rules, impeccable landscaping, and 5 rows of cascading villas.
projects.amenities: Cascading Pools, Long Beachfront, Dancing Fountain, Supermarket

projects.name: Jefaira
projects.description: A 1300-acre 'Beach Town' designed for year-round living. It features a downtown area, a university, and multiple distinct neighborhoods (The Furl, The Cribs, etc.).
projects.amenities: Downtown Jefaira, International University, Marina, Promenade

projects.name: Marseilia beach 3
projects.description: Located at Km 71, this phase focuses on offering spacious chalets and villas centered around large swimming pools and green areas.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Kids Area, Commercial Zone, Beach Activities

projects.name: The C
projects.description: Refers to 'The Cribs' neighborhood in Jefaira, characterized by its minimalist white architecture and studios/apartments designed for young people.
projects.amenities: Central Park, Swimming Pools, Community Center, Bike Lanes

projects.name: D-Bay
projects.description: A 200-acre project in El Dabaa featuring a unique stepping architecture that ensures sea views. It includes a lagoon and a 800m beachfront.
projects.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, Wellness Spa, Commercial Strip, Beach Clubhouse

projects.name: Blumar
projects.description: Located in Sidi Abdel Rahman, Blumar is a family favorite known for its reasonable prices, extensive pool networks, and proximity to the area's hotspots.
projects.amenities: Private Beach, Kids Area, Commercial Area, Swimming Pools

projects.name: Coral Hills
projects.description: Located at Km 183, offering elevated chalets with sea views. Known for being a quiet, budget-friendly option in a prime location.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Hotel, Shopping Mall, Sports Courts

projects.name: Hacienda Red
projects.description: A luxury boutique extension near Hacienda White, offering a more exclusive and private summer experience with the same high-end amenities.
projects.amenities: Exclusive Clubhouse, Lagoon Pools, Beach Bar, Concierge Services

projects.name: Azha North Coast
projects.description: A luxury 250-acre resort at Km 214, Ras El Hekma. It features 45 acres of swimmable crystal lagoons and high-end hospitality.
projects.amenities: Tanoak Hotel, Crystal Lagoons, Sports Club, Community Centers

projects.name: Masaya
projects.description: A boutique 30-acre project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 133). It is designed with elevated terraces to ensure sea views for all units.
projects.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Kids Area, Pharmacy & Mini Market

projects.name: Naia Bay
projects.description: A 'Greek Village' inspired resort in Ras El Hekma (Km 212). It features a crystalline lagoon by Crystal Lagoons® and offers a serene luxury lifestyle.
projects.amenities: 40,000 sqm Crystal Lagoon, Boutique Hotel, Beach Club, Commercial Strip

projects.name: Alura
projects.description: A distinctive project located within the Stella Heights area in Sidi Abdel Rahman. It focuses on serviced apartments and commercial excellence.
projects.amenities: Serviced Apartments, Commercial Walk, Swimming Pools, Housekeeping Services

projects.name: Diplo 3
projects.description: The third phase of the exclusive Diplomats community in Ras El Hekma/Sidi Abdel Rahman. Known for its elite community and Italian-style architecture.
projects.amenities: Private Beach, Wandering Garden, Kids' Wonder, Exclusive Clubhouse

projects.name: Shamasi
projects.description: A boutique project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 134) located next to Bianchi. It emphasizes water features and modern architecture.
projects.amenities: Swimmable Lagoon, Commercial Area, Clubhouse, Hotel Services

projects.name: Summer
projects.description: A massive destination in the Sidi Heneish area, designed to be a vibrant summer city with extensive beachfront and green spines.
projects.amenities: Water Activities Center, Commercial Hub, Sports District, Family Entertainment Zone

projects.name: Bianchi
projects.description: A revival of the historic Bianchi beach, now modernized with Greek-style architecture. It focuses on wellness and elite community living.
projects.amenities: Wellness Center, Swimmable Lagoon, Boutique Hotel, Wave Beach

projects.name: Playa
projects.description: An exclusive beach town designed by Alchemy. It features minimalist beach houses and a curated community atmosphere.
projects.amenities: Exclusive Beach Club, Boutique Retail, Swimming Pools, Promenade

projects.name: Marseilia Beach 2
projects.description: Located at Km 73, this is one of the established family resorts on the North Coast, known for its calm waters and family-friendly environment.
projects.amenities: Main Swimming Pool, Kids Aqua Park, Supermarket, Sports Courts

projects.name: Jamila
projects.description: A luxury resort in Sidi Heneish (Km 263) spanning 130 acres. It features a hotel, serviced apartments, and a layout where units are elevated for sea views.
projects.amenities: 5-star Hotel, Shopping Mall, Panoramic Pools, Underground Parking

projects.name: Q North
projects.description: A 100-acre project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 136), located opposite Stella Heights. It offers a mix of coastal living and commercial investment opportunities.
projects.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, International Hotel, Commercial Strip (Q Lane), Aqua Park

projects.name: Hacienda Blue
projects.description: Note: 'Hacienda Blue' is likely a user error. The coordinates map to the D-Bay/La Vista Bay area. Data provided is for Hacienda Bay as a fallback.
projects.amenities: 18-Hole Golf Course, Lake Yard, Multiple Hotels, Cabanas

projects.name: Yemm Beach Plaza - Ras El Hekma
Le Gray Beach Hotel and Residences
Lagoona - La Vista Ras El Hekma

Stella Heights.description: Located at Km 134, Stella Heights offers a mix of villas and chalets with a focus on privacy and proximity to the Sidi Abdel Rahman bay.
Stella Heights.amenities: Swimming Pools, Clubhouse, Commercial Area, Landscape Gardens

LVLS Mountain View.description: A luxury phase of Mountain View Ras El Hekma built on elevated terraces (Levels), offering exclusive sea views and a Grecco-inspired design.
LVLS Mountain View.amenities: Blu Ville (Commercial), Seaview Pools, Hospitality services, Sandy Beach

Diplo 2.description: Mountain View Diplomats (Diplo) is an exclusive community for diplomats and high-profile residents, known for its tight-knit community and Italian/Greek style.
Diplo 2.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Kids Areas, Sports Courts

Il Latini City Edge.description: The 'Latin District' brings old Alexandrian charm to New Alamein. It is a fully self-sufficient district with schools, hospitals, and classic architecture.
Il Latini City Edge.amenities: Classic Piazzas, Library, Mosque & Church, Retail Promenade

Gaia Cabanas.description: The dedicated cabana phase within the Gaia resort, located closest to the beach and the KYND 01 hotel.
Gaia Cabanas.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Hotel Services, Beach Bar, Lagoon View

Playa Ghazala.description: An exclusive enclave within the Ghazala Bay area, often associated with the Seashell community. Known for ultra-luxury beach houses.
Playa Ghazala.amenities: Ghazala Bay Beach, Exclusive Clubhouse, Fine Dining, Water Sports

Hacienda Heneish.description: Palm Hills' newest launch in Sidi Heneish (2024), bringing the famous Hacienda luxury brand to the pristine waters of Heneish.
Hacienda Heneish.amenities: Boutique Hotel, Beach Clubhouse, Sports Facilities, Commercial Hub

Alma New Alamein.description: A mixed-use project in New Alamein City offering modern residential units with access to the city's main amenities.
Alma New Alamein.amenities: Shopping Mall, Swimming Pools, Gym & Spa, Kids Area

Beach Front Towers.description: The iconic 'North Edge' towers standing right on the turquoise waters of Alamein. They redefined vertical living in the North Coast.
Beach Front Towers.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Sky High Gyms, Commercial Podium, Concierge Services

Bungalows.description: Located at Km 73, Bungalows offers a cozy, family-friendly environment with affordable chalet options and plenty of pools.
Bungalows.amenities: Swimming Pools, Football Court, Supermarket, Mosque

Marina 8 By The Lake.description: The newest expansion of the legendary Marina El Alamein, featuring modern lake-front villas and a revamped infrastructure.
Marina 8 By The Lake.amenities: Lake Promenade, Water Activities, Modern Clubhouse, Gated Security

Rivette - Amwaj.description: The commercial and retail hub of the Amwaj resort. It features a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment venues.

Hacienda White.description: The epitome of 'Old Money' luxury on the North Coast. Known for its 'Il Corte' mall, glamorous beach parties, and elite community.
Hacienda White.amenities: Il Corte Mall, Kiki's Beach Bar, Boutique Hotel, Lake-yard

La Vista Bay.description: The original La Vista in Ras El Hekma. Famous for its strict community rules, impeccable landscaping, and 5 rows of cascading villas.
La Vista Bay.amenities: Cascading Pools, Long Beachfront, Dancing Fountain, Supermarket

Jefaira.description: A 1300-acre 'Beach Town' designed for year-round living. It features a downtown area, a university, and multiple distinct neighborhoods (The Furl, The Cribs, etc.).
Jefaira.amenities: Downtown Jefaira, International University, Marina, Promenade

Marseilia beach 3.description: Located at Km 71, this phase focuses on offering spacious chalets and villas centered around large swimming pools and green areas.
Marseilia beach 3.amenities: Swimming Pools, Kids Area, Commercial Zone, Beach Activities

The C.description: Refers to 'The Cribs' neighborhood in Jefaira, characterized by its minimalist white architecture and studios/apartments designed for young people.
The C.amenities: Central Park, Swimming Pools, Community Center, Bike Lanes

D-Bay.description: A 200-acre project in El Dabaa featuring a unique stepping architecture that ensures sea views. It includes a lagoon and a 800m beachfront.
D-Bay.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, Wellness Spa, Commercial Strip, Beach Clubhouse

Blumar.description: Located in Sidi Abdel Rahman, Blumar is a family favorite known for its reasonable prices, extensive pool networks, and proximity to the area's hotspots.
Blumar.amenities: Private Beach, Kids Area, Commercial Area, Swimming Pools

Coral Hills.description: Located at Km 183, offering elevated chalets with sea views. Known for being a quiet, budget-friendly option in a prime location.
Coral Hills.amenities: Swimming Pools, Hotel, Shopping Mall, Sports Courts

Hacienda Red.description: A luxury boutique extension near Hacienda White, offering a more exclusive and private summer experience with the same high-end amenities.
Hacienda Red.amenities: Exclusive Clubhouse, Lagoon Pools, Beach Bar, Concierge Services

Azha North Coast.description: A luxury 250-acre resort at Km 214, Ras El Hekma. It features 45 acres of swimmable crystal lagoons and high-end hospitality.
Azha North Coast.amenities: Tanoak Hotel, Crystal Lagoons, Sports Club, Community Centers

Masaya.description: A boutique 30-acre project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 133). It is designed with elevated terraces to ensure sea views for all units.
Masaya.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Kids Area, Pharmacy & Mini Market

Naia Bay.description: A 'Greek Village' inspired resort in Ras El Hekma (Km 212). It features a crystalline lagoon by Crystal Lagoons® and offers a serene luxury lifestyle.
Naia Bay.amenities: 40,000 sqm Crystal Lagoon, Boutique Hotel, Beach Club, Commercial Strip

Alura.description: A distinctive project located within the Stella Heights area in Sidi Abdel Rahman. It focuses on serviced apartments and commercial excellence.
Alura.amenities: Serviced Apartments, Commercial Walk, Swimming Pools, Housekeeping Services

Diplo 3.description: The third phase of the exclusive Diplomats community in Ras El Hekma/Sidi Abdel Rahman. Known for its elite community and Italian-style architecture.
Diplo 3.amenities: Private Beach, Wandering Garden, Kids' Wonder, Exclusive Clubhouse

Shamasi.description: A boutique project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 134) located next to Bianchi. It emphasizes water features and modern architecture.
Shamasi.amenities: Swimmable Lagoon, Commercial Area, Clubhouse, Hotel Services

Summer.description: A massive destination in the Sidi Heneish area, designed to be a vibrant summer city with extensive beachfront and green spines.
Summer.amenities: Water Activities Center, Commercial Hub, Sports District, Family Entertainment Zone

Bianchi.description: A revival of the historic Bianchi beach, now modernized with Greek-style architecture. It focuses on wellness and elite community living.
Bianchi.amenities: Wellness Center, Swimmable Lagoon, Boutique Hotel, Wave Beach

Playa.description: An exclusive beach town designed by Alchemy. It features minimalist beach houses and a curated community atmosphere.
Playa.amenities: Exclusive Beach Club, Boutique Retail, Swimming Pools, Promenade

Marseilia Beach 2.description: Located at Km 73, this is one of the established family resorts on the North Coast, known for its calm waters and family-friendly environment.
Marseilia Beach 2.amenities: Main Swimming Pool, Kids Aqua Park, Supermarket, Sports Courts

Jamila.description: A luxury resort in Sidi Heneish (Km 263) spanning 130 acres. It features a hotel, serviced apartments, and a layout where units are elevated for sea views.
Jamila.amenities: 5-star Hotel, Shopping Mall, Panoramic Pools, Underground Parking

Q North.description: A 100-acre project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 136), located opposite Stella Heights. It offers a mix of coastal living and commercial investment opportunities.
Q North.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, International Hotel, Commercial Strip (Q Lane), Aqua Park

Hacienda Blue.description: Note: 'Hacienda Blue' is likely a user error. The coordinates map to the D-Bay/La Vista Bay area. Data provided is for Hacienda Bay as a fallback.
Hacienda Blue.amenities: 18-Hole Golf Course, Lake Yard, Multiple Hotels, Cabanas
